hero.title: There's a course we should run. Tell us.
hero.description: If you've identified a sector-specific HSE qualification that EIOSH should add to its catalogue — propose it. Our curriculum team reviews proposals every quarter.

intro: We add 4–6 new courses each year to the EIOSH catalogue. Most come from learners or partners who've spotted a regulatory gap, a sector need, or an awarding body update we should adopt early. If you've spotted one — let us know.
criteria: There's an underserved learner audience (sector, region, or job role).
An accredited awarding body already exists (or you have a credible path to launch one).
You can articulate the learning outcomes in ≤ 10 bullet points.
You've checked that no near-equivalent already exists in our catalogue at /courses.

cta.heading: Send us your proposal.
cta.description: Use the form on this page (or email curriculum@eiosh.com). We aim to respond within 10 working days.
